reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. Lo súper recomiendo. Soy socia del ACA. El auto se quedó varado en Bariloche. Una grúa llegó a los 30min. Al día siguiente se llevaron mi vehículo para trasladarlo a Bs.As. La asistencia al viajero de lo mejor.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I highly recommend it. I'm an ACA member. My car broke down in Bariloche. A tow truck arrived within 30 minutes. The next day they towed my vehicle to Buenos Aires. Their travel assistance is top-notch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2bU9fb2RREAE

reviews.comment:
Me hice socio mas que nada por el seguro pero al cotizarlo descubri que era mucho mas caro que Allianz 12 mil contra 9 mil mensuales el mismo seguro.
Tengan cuidado, no se confien en el seguro del ACA.
Al final me hice socio por nada

(Translated by Google)
I became a member mainly for the insurance, but when I got a quote, I discovered it was much more expensive than Allianz: 12,000 pesos versus 9,000 pesos per month for the same insurance.
Be careful, don't trust the ACA insurance. In the end, I became a member for nothing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2c2RfcTh3RRAB
